text.title: Diff-Coverage Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to roll diff coverage out end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: emit-coverage-report
step.input: CI test run for the stack.
step.action: Enable coverage instrumentation; emit lcov / coverage.xml / jacoco.xml on every PR build.
step.output: Coverage report artefact attached to the build.
step.decision-gate: Halt when instrumentation is broken or coverage report is empty.

step.name: compute-diff-coverage
step.input: Coverage report + PR diff against merge-base.
step.action: Run diff-cover (or equivalent) to compute changed-lines coverage per file.
step.decision-gate: Halt when the diff is empty (nothing changed) — skip the gate.

step.name: apply-policy
step.action: Apply default_threshold + per-glob overrides; compute gate_pass per file.
step.decision-gate: Reject merge when any per-file gate_pass is false.

step.name: publish-pr-comment
step.action: Post a PR comment with diff coverage as the headline metric, per-file table, and a small full-repo trend line.
step.decision-gate: Block merge while merge_gate_verdict is fail.

step.name: update-trend-dashboard
step.action: Push the data point to the dashboard; recompute 7d / 30d medians and the low-coverage-files list.
step.decision-gate: Flag any new low-coverage file in the monthly testing-meeting agenda.
